action_set_definitions.name: get_node_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the administrative state, current resource allocations, and hardware feature status for a specific network node.

node_id.description: The unique identifier of the node to inspect.

action_set_definitions.name: get_telemetry_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Fetches real-time performance data including packet drops, jitter, vCPU steal time, and Thermal TDP Load for monitoring.

node_id.description: The unique identifier of the node.

action_set_definitions.name: update_administrative_state
action_set_definitions.description: Changes the administrative state of a node to permit infrastructure modifications.

node_id.description: The unique identifier of the node.

target_state.description: The administrative state required for provisioning.

action_set_definitions.name: update_node_hardware_config
action_set_definitions.description: Enables or disables advanced hardware features like SR-IOV and NUMA alignment to resolve vCPU steal and packet processing bottlenecks.

node_id.description: The unique identifier of the node.

enable_sriov.description: Whether to enable Single Root I/O Virtualization for low-latency networking.

enable_numa_alignment.description: Whether to enforce Non-Uniform Memory Access alignment for processing efficiency.

action_set_definitions.name: reconfigure_node_resources
action_set_definitions.description: Scales the vCPU and memory allocation of a node to address resource exhaustion.

node_id.description: The unique identifier of the node.

vcpus.description: The new total number of vCPUs.

ram_gb.description: The new total amount of RAM in GB.

state_description.nodes: A list of strings representing the unique identifiers of active network nodes (e.g., routers, data centers).
state_description.links: A map where keys are link IDs and values contain 'source', 'target', 'capacity_gbps', and 'current_load_gbps'.
state_description.traffic_demands: A list of objects defining point-to-point traffic requirements, including 'source', 'destination', and 'demand_gbps'.
state_description.network_metrics: Internal aggregate counters such as 'total_dropped_traffic' or 'average_latency'.
